title: Identity Preserved Cinematic Street Portrait With Sketch Board
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved Cinematic Street Portrait With Sketch Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cinematic street portrait for uploaded adult identity reference with exact face, hairstyle, skin tone, proportions, and natural likeness, preserving exact identity while adding a creator-style poster-board sketch moment in busy downtown street with crosswalk, storefronts, and passing cyclists. Subject: The same adult person from uploaded adult identity reference with exact face, hairstyle, skin tone, proportions, and natural likeness keeps the exact face, eyes, nose, lips, hairstyle, skin tone, proportions, and natural likeness, with playful slightly mischievous natural expression and standing confidently in the center with hands loose at sides. Scene: busy downtown street with crosswalk, storefronts, and passing cyclists surrounds the subject with realistic urban life, street depth, passing movement, storefront texture, and cinematic city atmosphere. Composition: Centered street portrait: the subject stands confidently in oversized black hoodie, relaxed cargo pants, and casual streetwear while holding one large white poster board in front of the body. Signature Elements: Preserved identity preserved cinematic street portrait with sketch board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic street photography with natural identity preservation, creative personal-brand energy, realistic skin texture, believable street depth, and polished editorial detail. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: MIRA supplies the swappable sketch name text detail for this template. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
